text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
Starting from east Hokkaido, cutting to 
Hokkaido, then ride a ferry to Honshu, 
run to Shikoku, then Kyushu, Okinawa…

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
It's a perfect route. Though… 
it'll probably take a month.

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
Alright, I'm gonna replan this! It's not 
like I could leave for a month-long 
period right now.

Just like that, Stay Gold kept working on 
her travel plans till late into the night…
